text: Precision matters a lot to me — I work in a technical field, so vague or ambiguous language can genuinely mislead a reader. I also care about maintaining a formal academic tone throughout, and making sure the logic flows clearly from one paragraph to the next rather than feeling like a collection of disconnected points. And since I'm always working within a literature, I like to write in a way that leaves natural space for citations — the argument should feel grounded even before the references are filled in.
